About PROS

The standard of care
your residence deserves

PROS was founded on a singular conviction: that the most discerning property owners in New York City deserve a level of residential oversight commensurate with the value — financial and personal — of what they have built.

We are not a property management company. We do not manage rentals, broker transactions, or coordinate leases. We exist for one purpose alone: to serve as your most trusted, most capable, and most discreet on-the-ground presence in the city — ensuring your residence is in impeccable condition at all times.

Our clients travel. They maintain multiple residences. They are accustomed to excellence and will accept nothing less. We are proud to serve them.

NYC Private Residential Oversight

Pre-Arrival Perfection

Our Services

Every detail managed.
Every concern silenced.

Every service is delivered with the discretion of a trusted confidant, the precision of a seasoned professional, and the dedication of someone who understands what is truly at stake.

I

Property Inspections

Thorough, scheduled walkthroughs of every room, system, and surface — with comprehensive photo documentation delivered directly to you after each visit. Nothing escapes our attention.

II

Vendor Supervision

Every contractor, housekeeper, and tradesperson who enters your residence does so under our watchful eye. We vet, coordinate, supervise, and follow up — so standards are never compromised.

III

Pre-Arrival Preparation

Your residence prepared to perfection before every return. Temperature calibrated. Fresh flowers arranged. Every detail confirmed. You walk in to exactly what you deserve — effortless luxury.

IV

Building Liaison

Your representative in every interaction with co-op boards, building management, and staff. We maintain the relationships that protect your interests and preserve your standing within your building.

V

Emergency Response

Available at any hour, for any urgency. Should the unexpected arise, we respond with the calm authority and decisive action of someone who has been trusted with your most valued possession.

VI

Monthly Estate Reports

A beautifully prepared written account of your property's condition, activity, and upcoming considerations — delivered monthly with the thoroughness of a trusted estate steward.

VII

Private Concierge

For the client whose life demands seamless coordination across every dimension. From private travel arrangements and bespoke sourcing to lifestyle management and last-minute requests — we anticipate your needs before you express them.

Our Philosophy

Discretion is not a feature.
It is our foundation.

We understand that the homes we are entrusted to oversee are not simply properties. They are sanctuaries. Reflections of a life carefully curated. The repositories of what matters most. We treat them — and the trust placed in us — accordingly.

◈

Absolute Discretion

Every vendor and staff member signs a non-disclosure agreement. Client information is held in encrypted systems. Your privacy is never negotiable, never compromised.

◆

Uncompromising Standards

We accept a deliberately limited number of clients. This is not a constraint — it is our commitment to ensuring that each residence in our care receives the full depth of our attention.

◉

Total Accountability

We report with transparency, act with integrity, and stand fully accountable for every aspect of the service we provide. Your trust is the privilege we work each day to deserve.

"

For the first time in years, I travel without a single thought about my apartment. PROS has not merely met my expectations — they have redefined what I thought possible.

— Private Client  ·  Upper East Side, Manhattan
